codeReview.summary: All 6 Stream A medium-severity fixes achieve good 1:1 parity with their Python references. The implementations correctly handle the core logic, error cases, and edge conditions. Test coverage is thorough with 28 new tests covering happy paths, error paths, and edge cases for each fix.

issues.description: Extra 'invalid base font size' error branch not present in Python. Python's split_value always returns a quantity/unit tuple and falls through to the 'incorrect units' error. Go adds a nil-quantity guard that logs a different error message. This is a reasonable defensive Go idiom but is a minor deviation from 1:1 parity. No functional impact.

Pre-existing: the rem conversion block in Go does not guard on generate_epub2/GENERATE_EPUB2_COMPATIBLE like Python does at yj_to_epub_properties.py:1732. This was NOT part of this fix's scope (existed before), but worth noting for future parity work.

validateOverlayCondition is a standalone function only called from tests currently. It is not yet wired into the main content processing pipeline. This is appropriate for the current milestone since the full overlay template processing is not yet implemented, but the validation logic itself is correct and matches Python yj_to_epub_content.py:491-504.

summary: PASS. All 6 Stream A medium-severity fixes correctly match their Python references with strong test coverage (28 tests). Fix 1 ($258 no override): correctly removes the chooseFragmentIdentity call for $258 fragments, matching Python's organize_fragments_by_type which has no special ID override for $258. Fix 2 (non-SHORT logging): correctly emits log.Printf for non-SHORT book symbol formats after determineBookSymbolFormat, matching yj_to_epub.py:239. Fix 3 (checkSymbolTable): comprehensive implementation with checkSymbolTableWithConfig accepting all book flags, matching all expected-unused exception categories (mkfx_id, UUIDs, PAGE_LIST_*, -ad suffix for samples, yj.print./yj.semantics. for kpf_prepub, reportedFIDs) from yj_structure.py:1099-1160. Fix 4 (has_illustrated_layout): correctly checks pt.Condition directly with matchConditionPattern instead of recursing through it, matching yj_structure.py:1228-1253. Fix 5 ($171 validation): validateOverlayCondition correctly validates layout==$324, IonSExp length 3, operator in conditionOperatorNames, fv[1]==$183, fv[2] as IonSExp of length 2 with fv[2][0]==$266, matching yj_to_epub_content.py:501-504. Fix 6 (font_size KeyError): properly handles missing inherited/element font-size during rem conversion with error logging, matching yj_to_epub_properties.py:1734-1738. Three minor non-blocking observations noted.
